purpose: Tracked 1.0 readiness status snapshot. It records observed gaps and required proof artifacts; it is not completion evidence.

approvalTarget.resolutionRule: Resolve git rev-parse HEAD and git diff --name-only ec68c61..HEAD immediately before recording each approval; both approval records must name that resolved head and full range.

task2.liveDecision: expense-list ignores start/end and honors page/page-size

operationReachability.currentMappingMethod: scripts/generate-operation-parity.mjs derives inferredSdk from OpenAPI sdkGroup and sdkMethod; it does not import the generated SDK or execute the named method.
operationReachability.requiredClosureArtifact: docs/roadmap-1.0-receipts/task-05-generated-reachability.md maps every claimed SDK path to an importable generated client method.

crossPackageReleaseProof.currentPackSmokeBehavior: scripts/pack-consumer-smoke.mjs creates temporary tarballs and temporary consumer roots, then removes them unless KEEP_CLOCKIFY_PACK_SMOKE_TEMP=1.
crossPackageReleaseProof.requiredClosureArtifact: docs/roadmap-1.0-receipts/task-13-exact-artifact.md names the three tarball digests, consumer commands, and successful outputs.

remoteMutationProof.requiredClosureArtifact: docs/roadmap-1.0-receipts/task-18-remote-mutation.md records GitHub Actions run URLs and retained mutation-reports artifact names for every approved target.
